title: Influence of Oleic Acid/Medium Chain Glycerides Lipophilic Vehicles on Ibuprofen Skin Permeation. III.

anchor_evidence.snippet: Table 4. Steady-state flux values and permeability coefficients for the permeation of ibuprofen from saturated formulations containing MO and MG 812 through human epidermis (mean ± SD, n = 5)
Table 3. Steady-state flux values and permeability coefficients for the permeation of ibuprofen from saturated formulations containing MO and/or MG through silicone membrane (mean ± SD, n = 4)

notes: The study investigates the effect of lipophilic vehicles, specifically Mineral Oil (MO) and Miglyol 812 (MG), on ibuprofen skin permeation using Franz diffusion cells.
